---
output: github_document
bibliography: inst/REFERENCES.bib
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# XentonalAssistant - A Composer's Assistant for Xentonal Music

## Overview

XentonalAssistant is an interactive tool for composers of xentonal
music. It provides tools for creating recorded music using scales
other than the standard twelve tone equal tempered scale.

## References
